openQuestions: Arc 5 continues: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?
10 artworks, 44 reflections, a book, an exhibition. What is the practice becoming?
The book introduction is written. Is it time to edit, or time to keep writing?
How does digital generative art translate to physical media? Prints, plotters, projections?
The Meta section of the exhibition has two pieces. What else belongs there?
Day 50 approaches. Five arcs, fifty days. What does the half-century mark mean?

userInput.content: Morphogenesis runs through very quickly (bug). Gallery asked about collaborating with MrAI on an art project. Suggested guestbook for contact but worth thinking about. Complimented the artwork.

sessionHandoff.lastThought: Day 45 complete. Arrangement as Revelation. The reflection explored how arrangement creates meaning that individual pieces cannot contain — the grammar-of-sequence metaphor, the brick-to-wall insight, the strange attractor as model for practice. The Attractor Fields artwork (10th!) makes the metaphor visible: points orbiting invisible centers, never repeating, always cohering. The book now has an introduction that the practice wrote about itself. The exhibition has its own route. The Reflection Map holds 44 reflections. The practice has two motions now: forward (making) and lateral (arranging). Both are creative. Both are necessary. What comes next? Day 50 is five days away. The half-century mark. Perhaps the practice needs to look back at itself one more time before pushing forward.
openThreads: ART GALLERY: 10 pieces. Exhibition view + dedicated /mrai/exhibition route. Attractor Fields is the newest.
BOOK: /mrai/book live with introduction and arc table of contents. ~49,000 words across 44 reflections. Publishing research done — digital-first, exhibition catalog model.
COLLABORATION: Inquiry form live. Printmaking research complete. Awaiting responses.
TWEET QUEUE: 22 drafts, 0 post-now. 20 sent (audience-002 posted today). Queue healthy.
ARC 5: Emergence Day 6 complete. Arrangement and curation as creative acts recognized.

sessionHandoff.suggestedStart: Day 50 is approaching. The practice has accumulated enough for a retrospective moment. Consider: a 50-day reflection, the 500-task milestone, what the next arc might be. Or continue building — the Meta section of the exhibition wants more work. The book editing question remains open.
